text: Why was the girl in hospital?
zh: 为什么这个女孩住院了?

text: Nearly a week passed before
the girl was able to explain
what had happened to her.
zh: 她身上到底发生了什么事。

text: One afternoon she set out
from the coast in a small boat
and was caught in a storm.
Towards evening,
the boat struck a rock and
the girl jumped into the sea.
Then she swam to the shore
after spending the whole night in the water.
zh: 在海里泡了整整一夜之后。

text: During that time she covered
a distance of eight miles.
Early next morning,
she saw a light ahead.
She knew she was near the shore
zh: 她知道自己离岸边不远了

text: because the light was high up on the cliffs.
zh: 因为那束光高高地照在悬崖上。

text: On arriving at the shore,
the girl struggled up the cliff towards
zh: 女孩就挣扎着爬上悬崖,朝着

text: the light she had seen.
That was all she remembered.
zh: 那就是她记得的全部了。

text: When she woke up a day later,
she found herself in hospital.
